files.name: README.md
files.content:
# Memory Folder

Daily logs go here:
- `YYYY-MM-DD.md` - Daily activity logs
- `session-state.md` - Checkpoint before compaction
- `heartbeat-state.json` - Track periodic checks

Don't delete these - they're your AI's continuity.

files.name: session-state.md
files.content:
# Session State

---

_This file is your AI's checkpoint. It updates before context compaction._

folders.description: Active projects and work in progress

files.name: README.md
files.content:
# Projects Folder

Organize your work here:
- One subfolder per project
- Keep related files together
- Your AI will reference these when working

Example structure:
```
projects/
  my-app/
    README.md
    notes.md
    code/
  client-work/
    project-brief.md
```

files.name: README.md
files.content:
# Scripts Folder

Put reusable scripts here:
- Bash automation
- Python utilities
- Node.js helpers

Your AI can run scripts from here via `exec` tool.

Make them executable:
```bash
chmod +x scripts/my-script.sh
```
